_comment: Frozen sample response for the /p/competitor-lens demo input. When the exact canonical input hash below matches, main.py returns this blob immediately instead of doing a live fetch/model run.

positioning.angle: Floom positions itself as the production layer that turns AI-written Python scripts into live apps with a URL, REST API, web UI, and MCP.
n8n positions itself as a workflow automation and AI agent platform for technical teams, mixing a visual canvas with deeper code and broad integrations.
Floom sells fast deployment for AI-written code, while n8n sells flexible workflow automation for technical teams.

pricing.pricing: Free and open source; the homepage emphasizes no credit card and does not surface paid tiers.
Starter from 20€/mo, Pro from 50€/mo, Business from 667€/mo annually, plus Enterprise contact-sales pricing.

78627a9198e5b7744928007e4e078838f32c4de7.pricing_insight: Floom's page leads with speed-to-live and free/open-source trust signals, while n8n puts explicit execution-based plans in front of buyers.
unique_to_you: One script becomes four outputs: live URL, web UI, REST API, and MCP
Deploy AI-written Python code in about 45 seconds
Paste-code workflow aimed at turning local scripts into shareable apps
unique_to_competitor: Visual workflow canvas with traceable AI-agent reasoning
500+ integrations and a large template ecosystem
Execution-based pricing with both cloud and self-hosted paths
